title: Dr. Mimi Syed: Not Another Child, Not Another Hospital [ IPC#83]
description: This transition period is by far the most dangerous in human history. We invite you and your organizations to join the International Peace Coalition this Friday at 11am ET/5pm CET. We will be joined by Dr. Nidal Jboor, Co-founder of Doctors Against Genocide and other doctors from Gaza; Fernando Garzon, leader of the Ecuadorian-Palestinian Union, and a former government adviser; Ray McGovern, former CIA analyst and co-founder of the Veteran Intelligence Professionals for Sanity (VIPS).
